full_text:
Chen Tai (Xuanbo) 陳泰 (玄伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Tai (陳泰), styledXuanbo (玄伯). Son of Chen Qun. Defended Wei against Jiang Wei. Wept at Cao Mao’s death, and died soon after. Chen Tai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chen Tai lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
